title: cleidion veillonii
intro: Cleidion veillonii, also known as the "Veillon's cleidion," is a plant species native to Africa, belonging to the family Burseraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cleidion veillonii include relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cleidion veillonii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically taken internally or applied topically to the affected area.
